title: Chibi Blocks
description: Changes block models to be "chibi" and in the style of the Minecraft launcher icons (8x8 lil cubes)
body:
Changes block models to be "chibi" and in the style of the Minecraft launcher icons (8x8 lil cubes)

**ONLY AFFECTS BLOCK MODELS IN THE INVENTORY. BLOCK MODELS ARE LEFT UNCHANGED.**

Worked in collaboration with Miffen Kop (go give them some love!)

no optifine required.

Credits can be found in the credits.txt file in the pack
